Lyra Ashfen.description: A spellbook containing spells you developed together. +1 to Arcana checks.

Elara Moss.description: A small cloth bundle with something sewn into it. Advantage on one saving throw per long rest.

Torven Ashfall.description: Torven's personal signet. Advantage on social checks with Conclave members.

Nasha Vren.description: The coin she always carried. +1 to Investigation checks.

Thessaly Brightwater.description: A war correspondent's credential. +1 to Insight checks.

Commander Serath.description: Serath's old insignia, reversed. +1 to Intimidation checks.

Zinnia Quickfingers.description: Something she 'found' that turned out to be exactly what you needed. +1 to Sleight of Hand checks.

The Guardian.description: A small piece of Tower stone that glows faintly in darkness. +1 to History checks about magic.
